title: Venice ($VVV) Sees 6x Growth in 4.5 Months: Is It Overvalued?
summary: Venice's daily text inference has surged from 10 billion to 55-65 billion tokens, a 6x increase. This rapid growth raises questions about its valuation and sustainability.
body:
Venice ($VVV), a leading AI inference provider, has experienced a significant surge in usage. According to a tweet by @nikshepsvn, Venice's daily text inference has grown from approximately 10 billion tokens in January to 55-65 billion tokens today. This represents a 6x increase in just 4.5 months, highlighting the platform's rapid adoption and scaling capabilities.

The tweet also includes a chart that visually represents this growth trajectory. The data suggests that Venice is handling a substantial volume of text inferences, which is a key metric for AI services. This growth could be attributed to increased demand for AI-powered applications, partnerships, or new features that have attracted more users.

For everyday users, this growth could mean more reliable and faster AI services. However, the rapid increase in usage also raises questions about the platform's ability to sustain this growth and whether the current valuation accurately reflects its long-term potential. Investors and users alike should monitor how Venice manages this scaling to ensure continued performance and value.

To stay informed, keep an eye on Venice's official announcements and performance metrics. This will help you understand the platform's trajectory and make informed decisions about its use and investment potential. Read more → https://x.com/nikshepsvn/status/2054584822375563551
twitterThread: Venice ($VVV) just hit 55-65B daily text inferences, up 6x in 4.5 months. Is this growth sustainable?
The platform's rapid scaling raises questions about its valuation and ability to maintain this pace. Key metric to watch: daily text inference volume.
Keep an eye on Venice's official updates to see if this growth continues. Read more → https://cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-05-13-venice-vvv-sees-6x-growth-in-45-months-is-it-overvalued
